title: cochlidium minus
intro: Cochlidium minus is a rare and lesser-known species of plant, belonging to the family Polypodiaceae and commonly referred to as the 'Miniature Cliff Brake'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cochlidium minus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Cochlidium minus typically involve infusing the leaves in water or making a decoction, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
